shots.reasoning_brief: Visual-only establishing shot with subtitle; no characters in foreground, no dialogue or music.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 少来。你才好看，这条裙子起码六位数吧？

shots.reasoning_brief: Dialogue from Shen Niange to Lin Yuwei; single character visible based on mid-shot description in context.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: LIN_YUWEI_RIVAL
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 今晚是陆氏集团的晚宴，你知道陆景琛会来对不对？

shots.reasoning_brief: Lin Yuwei speaking to Shen Niange while holding arm; both in frame from prior interaction.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 陆景琛和我们有什么关系。好好干活，别走神。

shots.reasoning_brief: Shen Niange responding to Lin Yuwei; focus on her in close-up from context.
Lu Jingchen responding to Zhao Yiming; his gaze sweeps hall, primary visible.
Transition visual with music cue; Shen Niange in rest area, no dialogue.
Visual-only: Shen Niange reading message, Lin Yuwei enters; both in mid-shot.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: LIN_YUWEI_RIVAL
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 来，喝杯果汁。今晚你站太久了。

shots.reasoning_brief: Lin Yuwei offering juice to Shen Niange; focus on her.
Shen Niange thanking Lin Yuwei while taking cup; single focus.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: LIN_YUWEI_RIVAL
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 念歌，我跟你说，陆景琛真的来了。刚才进门的时候我差点被他帅到——

shots.reasoning_brief: Lin Yuwei gossiping to Shen Niange; seated beside her.
Shen Niange laughing response to Lin Yuwei.
Shen Niange questioning Lin Yuwei after pause.
Self-muttered by Shen Niange; no listener.
Visual-only wake-up scene; both in bed, blurred figures.
Lu Jingchen waking, voice to unknown; no specific listener.
Shen Niange refusing to housekeeper; trembling voice.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我说了。我不需要。告诉你们陆少……那晚的事，我什么都不会说。你放心。

shots.reasoning_brief: Shen Niange firmly refusing, addressing housekeeper about Lu.
Shen Niange on phone to father; broken voice, fade out.
